description: The Vercel CLI for deploying and managing your Vercel projects

option.name: --all
tip: Show all team events (ignore linked project auto-scoping)

option.name: --limit
tip: Number of results to return per page (default: 20, max: 100)

option.name: --since
tip: Show events after this date (ISO 8601 or relative: 1d, 7d, 30d)

option.name: --until
tip: Show events before this date (ISO 8601 or relative)

next.name: types
tip: List available event types with descriptions

next.name: agent
tip: Generate AGENTS.md with Vercel best practices

next.name: inspect
tip: Show metadata, lifecycle events, usage, and subagent data for an Agent Run

next.name: list
tip: List Agent Runs for a project

next.name: projects
tip: List projects in the current team with Agent Runs activity

next.name: trace
tip: Show the trace for an Agent Run (turns, messages, reasoning, and tool calls)

next.name: coding-agents
tip: Connect local coding agents to the AI Gateway

next.name: alerts
tip: List alerts for a project or team

option.name: --ai
tip: Print AI-focused sections instead of table output

option.name: --limit
tip: Number of results to return per page (default: 20, max: 100)

option.name: --since
tip: Start of time range (ISO-8601). Defaults to 24 hours ago

option.name: --until
tip: End of time range (ISO-8601). Defaults to now

next.name: inspect
tip: Show details for a single alert group

next.name: rules
tip: Create, list, update, or delete alert notification rules

next.name: remove
tip: Remove an alias using its hostname

next.name: api
tip: Make authenticated HTTP requests to the Vercel API [beta]

option.name: --dangerously-skip-permissions
tip: Skip confirmation prompts for DELETE operations (use with caution)

option.name: --field
tip: Add a typed parameter. Use @file for file contents

option.name: --input
tip: Read request body from file (use - for stdin)

option.name: --method
tip: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)

option.name: --raw-field
tip: Add a string option (no type parsing)

option.name: --refresh
tip: Force refresh the cached OpenAPI spec

option.name: --spec-url
tip: Fetch endpoints from a custom OpenAPI spec URL

option.name: --verbose
tip: Show debug information including full request/response

next.name: bisect
tip: Use binary search to find the deployment that introduced a bug

option.name: --open
tip: Automatically open each URL in the browser

option.name: --path
tip: Subpath of the deployment URL to test

option.name: --run
tip: Test script to run for each deployment

next.name: blob
tip: Manages your Blob stores and files

option.name: --oidc-token
tip: OIDC token for the Blob store (must be passed with --store-id)

option.name: --store-id
tip: Blob store id, with or without the store_ prefix (must be passed with --oidc-token)

next.name: copy
tip: Copy a file in the Blob store

next.name: del
tip: Delete a file from the Blob store

next.name: empty-store
tip: Delete all blobs in a Blob store

next.name: get
tip: Download a blob by URL or pathname

next.name: list
tip: List all files in the Blob store

next.name: presign
tip: Generate a presigned URL for Blob operations

next.name: put
tip: Upload a file to the Blob store

next.name: signed-token
tip: Issue a short-lived signed token for Blob operations

option.name: --id
tip: Deployment ID to pull environment variables from

option.name: --output
tip: Directory where built assets will be written to

option.name: --project
tip: Project name or ID (defaults to the linked project)

option.name: --standalone
tip: Create a standalone build with all dependencies inlined into function output folders

option.name: --yes
tip: Skip the confirmation prompt about pulling environment variables and project settings

next.name: buy
tip: Purchase Vercel products for your team

next.name: addon
tip: Purchase a Vercel addon for your team

next.name: credits
tip: Purchase Vercel credits for your team

next.name: pro
tip: Purchase a Vercel Pro subscription for your team

next.name: cache
tip: Manages cache for your current Project

next.name: dangerously-delete
tip: Dangerously delete all cached content by tag

next.name: invalidate
tip: Invalidate all cached content by tag

next.name: purge
tip: Purge cache for the current project

next.name: issue
tip: Issue a new certificate for a domain

next.name: attach
tip: Attach a Vercel project to a connector for one or more environments

next.name: detach
tip: Detach a Vercel project from a connector

next.name: list
tip: List connectors linked to the current project

next.name: open
tip: Open a connector in the Vercel dashboard

next.name: revoke-tokens
tip: Revoke tokens issued from a connector

next.name: token
tip: Get a token for a connector

next.name: contract
tip: Show contract information for billing periods

next.name: crons
tip: Manage cron jobs for a project [beta]

next.name: add
tip: Add a cron job to vercel.json

next.name: list
tip: List all cron jobs for a project

next.name: run
tip: Trigger a cron job to run immediately

next.name: curl
tip: cURL requests to your linked project's deployment [beta]

option.name: --deployment
tip: The deployment ID or URL to target

option.name: --json
tip: With --trace, emit { response, requestId } as JSON on stdout

option.name: --protection-bypass
tip: Protection bypass secret for accessing protected deployments

option.name: --trace
tip: Capture a session trace for the request and print the trace request id

option.name: --yes
tip: Skip confirmation when linking is required

option.name: --archive
tip: Compress the deployment code into an archive before uploading

option.name: --dry
tip: Inspect the detected framework preset and source files without deploying

option.name: --force
tip: Force a new deployment even if nothing has changed

option.name: --guidance
tip: Receive command suggestions once deployment is complete

option.name: --no-wait
tip: Don't wait for the deployment to finish

option.name: --prebuilt
tip: Use in combination with `vc build`. Deploy an existing build

option.name: --project
tip: Project name or ID (defaults to the linked project)

option.name: --regions
tip: Set default regions to enable the deployment on

option.name: --skip-domain
tip: Disable the automatic promotion of the relevant domains to a new production deployment

option.name: --yes
tip: Use default options to skip all prompts

next.name: deploy-hooks
tip: Manage deploy hooks for Git-triggered builds

next.name: create
tip: Create a deploy hook for a Git branch

next.name: list
tip: List deploy hooks for a project

next.name: remove
tip: Remove a deploy hook by id

option.name: --listen
tip: Specify a URI endpoint on which to listen [0.0.0.0:3000]

option.name: --local
tip: Start the dev server without linking to a Vercel project

option.name: --project
tip: Project name or ID (defaults to the linked project)

option.name: --yes
tip: Accept default value for all prompts

next.name: remove
tip: Remove a DNS entry using its ID

next.name: add
tip: Add a domain name that you already own to a Vercel Team

next.name: check
tip: Check if a domain is available to buy

next.name: inspect
tip: Displays information related to a domain

next.name: list
tip: Show all domains in a list (default)

next.name: move
tip: Move ownership of a domain name to another Vercel Team

next.name: price
tip: Show registrar price quotes for one or more domains

next.name: remove
tip: Remove ownership of a domain name from a Vercel Team

next.name: search
tip: Discover domain-name candidates from a keyword or fragment

next.name: transfer-in
tip: Transfer in a domain name to Vercel

next.name: verify
tip: Check a domain's DNS configuration and explain what to fix

next.name: backups
tip: List, inspect, or restore Edge Config backups

next.name: get
tip: Show metadata for an Edge Config

next.name: items
tip: List items in an Edge Config, or fetch one item with --key

next.name: list
tip: List Edge Config stores for the current team

next.name: tokens
tip: List, create, or revoke read tokens for an Edge Config

next.name: update
tip: Rename an Edge Config and/or patch items

next.name: env
tip: Manages the Environment Variables for your current Project

next.name: list
tip: List all Environment Variables for a Project

next.name: pull
tip: Pull all Development Environment Variables from the cloud and write to a file [.env.local]

next.name: run
tip: Run a command with environment variables from the linked Vercel project

next.name: update
tip: Update the value of an existing Environment Variable

next.name: firewall
tip: Manages Vercel Firewall configuration and custom rules

next.name: attack-mode
tip: Manage attack mode, which challenges all incoming requests with a verification page

next.name: diff
tip: Show draft changes that have been made but not yet published

next.name: discard
tip: Permanently discard all unpublished draft changes

next.name: ip-blocks
tip: Manage IP blocking rules that deny access from specific addresses or ranges

next.name: overview
tip: Show a summary of your project's firewall configuration

next.name: publish
tip: Publish all draft firewall changes to production

next.name: rules
tip: Manage custom firewall rules that control how traffic is handled based on conditions

next.name: system-bypass
tip: Manage system bypass rules that allow specific IPs to skip firewall checks

next.name: system-mitigations
tip: Manage automatic DDoS protection and system-level traffic filtering

next.name: flags
tip: Manage feature flags for a Vercel project

next.name: disable
tip: Shortcut to serve the false variant of a boolean feature flag

next.name: enable
tip: Shortcut to serve the true variant of a boolean feature flag

next.name: inspect
tip: Display information about a feature flag

next.name: list
tip: List all feature flags for the current project

next.name: open
tip: Open feature flags in the Vercel dashboard

next.name: override
tip: Encrypt flag overrides into a secure token for the vercel-flag-overrides cookie

next.name: prepare
tip: Prepare flag definition fallbacks for the build

next.name: rollout
tip: Configure a progressive rollout for a feature flag in an environment

next.name: rules
tip: Manage conditional rules for feature flags

next.name: sdk-keys
tip: Manage SDK keys for feature flags

next.name: set
tip: Set the served variant for a feature flag in an environment

next.name: split
tip: Configure a weighted split for a feature flag in an environment

next.name: versions
tip: List and compare version history for a feature flag

next.name: git
tip: Manage Git provider repository for your current Project

next.name: connect
tip: Connect your Vercel Project to your Git repository or provide the remote URL

next.name: disconnect
tip: Disconnect the Git repository from your Vercel Project

next.name: httpstat
tip: Visualize HTTP timing statistics for deployments

tip: Set the team ID or slug; use with --project for non-interactive links

tip: Skip questions when setting up with default team and settings

tip: Add projects to an existing repository link created by link --repo

tip: Number of results to return per page (default: 20, max: 100)

option.name: --policy

option.name: --status
tip: Filter deployments by their status (comma-separated for multiple)

next.name: logs
tip: Displays the logs for a deployment

option.name: --branch
tip: Filter by git branch (defaults to current branch)

tip: Filter logs to a specific deployment ID or URL

option.name: --environment
tip: Filter by environment: production or preview

option.name: --expand
tip: Show full log message below each request line

option.name: --json
tip: Output logs as JSON Lines for piping to other tools

option.name: --no-follow
tip: No-op; deployment arguments only stream logs when --follow is set

option.name: --project
tip: Project name or ID (defaults to the linked project)

option.name: --until
tip: End time (ISO format or relative, default: now)

tip: Order grouped results by value or count (default: count)

tip: Start time: relative (1h, 30m, 2d) or ISO date (default: 1h)
